chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-828 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 09.10.2025 M/s. Muhammad Afzal Jagirani and Hayat Muhammad, Advocates for the Petitioner. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh assisted by Zain-ul-Abideen Abbasi, Assistant Prosecutor General, Sindh a/w SIP Hafeez and SIP Ruknuddin. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. assisted by Mr. Aftab Ahmed Bhutto, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. ------ Through this petition, the petitioner seeks removal of Incharge 15 Madadgar, Kashmore-Kandhkot on the pretext that said police official is causing harassment to him and his family members. Pursuant to notice, the police officials have effected their appearance and filed their respective statements, taken on record. They submit that they will provide protection to the petitioner in accordance with law. As far as removal of the police official is concerned, no concrete material or tangible evidence has been adduced with the petition, which may warrant interference of this Court. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of with directions to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law. Judge Judge Manzoor
